heading: Omitted
label: 677t Omitted
notes: CodificationSection, , , which provided that nothing in this subchapter would abrogate any water rights of the tribe or its members, was omitted from the Code as being of special and not general application.act Aug. 27, 1954, ch. 1009, § 2168 Stat. 877
